subcodes.first_line: O companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At this moment, in the gathering of the beloved ones and the assembly of the pure in heart, His Holiness Ḥaydar-'Alí is present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء الان در محفل احباء و انجمن اصفیا حضرت حیدر قبل علی حاضر و
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
